capture.gpsTitle: GPS confidence radius — your true location is likely within this distance, not off by it.

detail.lowConfidence: Low GPS confidence: ±{{meters}}m. Your true position is likely within this radius.

capture.plantTitle: Identify an invasive plant from this photo
capture.plantHint: For plant ID: frame a single leaf or flower close-up — one species per photo.

errors.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser's site settings.
errors.notFound: No camera was found for this browser session.
errors.notReadable: Camera is busy or unavailable. Close other apps using the camera and try again.
errors.overconstrained: Requested camera constraints are not supported on this device.
errors.unavailableEnv: Camera is unavailable in this environment.
errors.notSupported: Camera is not supported in this browser.
errors.waitingForFix: Waiting for a GPS fix. Please wait a few seconds, or set the location manually.
errors.lowConfidenceConfirm: GPS confidence is low (±{{meters}}m). Save anyway? Your true position is likely within this radius.
errors.plantSinglePhoto: Plant captures are single-photo. Pick one file at a time.

item.removeConfirmBody: The item will be removed from this spot. An entry is kept in the edit history so this action can be reviewed and, if needed, restored later.

detail.signInToEditPlant: Sign in to edit the identification.
detail.signInToEditItems: Sign in to edit detected items.
detail.plantNotConfident: Could not identify with confidence. Try a clearer leaf or flower photo.
detail.failedRetryHint: Try again from the spot menu.

panel.empty: No picks yet. Take or import a photo to log your first pick.
panel.plantNotConfident: Could not identify with confidence. Try a clearer leaf or flower photo.
panel.noLitterFound: No detectable litter items were found.
panel.deleteConfirm: Delete this pick? This cannot be undone.

manualLocation.title: Pick location on map
manualLocation.hint: Tap the map to drop a pin. Accuracy will be marked as unknown.

locationPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search a place or paste lat,lng…
